TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Baga_mu, title = Baga_mu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baga_mu} }

S.FORM: = Baga mu = Dha baga dha baga tpaqi tpaqi, kingal mangai cimu kingal mangan ciyux ma balay ma balay.
S.PHON: = baga mu = dħa baga dħa baga tpaqi tpaqi, kiŋal maŋai ʦimu kiŋal maŋan ʦijux ma balaj ma balaj.
S.FORM: = Baga mu = Dha baga dha baga tpaqi tpaqi, kingal mangai cimu kingal mangan ciyux ma balay ma balay.
S.PHON: = baga mu = dħa baga dħa baga tpaqi tpaqi, kiŋal maŋai ʦimu kiŋal maŋan ʦijux ma balaj ma balaj.
